titleStmt.title: SII 5.491: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri

No. 491. (A.R. No. 192 of 1894). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE RANGANAYAKA TEMPLE AT NELLORE. See Nellore Inscriptions, Part II, p. 840 f. Though this and the following inscriptions had been published by Messrs Butterworth and Venugopala Chetty their texts are given here as there are differences in reading.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīmaturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉ muṭittalaiyuṅ ko
ṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 1 vatu jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattu puliyūrkkoṭṭamāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu nakaram
pūntamali veṭṭantai nampiyāṇṭi makaṉ vempāḻvāṉeṉ Immaṇṭalat
tu cetikulamāṇikkavaḷanāṭṭup peṭaināṭṭu nellūrāṉa vikkaramaciṅkapura
ttu tiruppāṟkaṭal cittirameḻiviṇṇakarāṉa paḷḷikoṇṭaperumāḷ koyi
luṭ tiruccuṟṟil Eṉ tavappaṉ nampiyāṇṭi Ukantaruḷuvitta civarāka Empeṟumāṉu
kkut tiruviṭaiyāṭṭamāka Ittiruppāṟkaṭal Akarattu muṉṉāḷil Eṉ tavappaṉ
Uraṅkāvillitāsar pāṭukoṇṭu viṭṭa pākam Oṉṟum Ivvāṇṭu nāḷ Ivvakara
ttu mātavapaṭṭaṉ pāṭukoṇṭu viṭṭa pākam Oṉṟum Ivviraṇṭu pākamu
m cantirātittavarai celvatākak koṇṭu viṭṭeṉ veṭṭantai vempā
ḻvāṉeṉ .
Digital edition of SII 5.491 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
